form.formComment: Comes here off a 51-day let-up. Last start 5th of 7 at Esperance Rtg 69+ on February 20 over 1400m, 5.5 len behind Debonnaire carrying 59kg at $7.50. The run before that 7th of 14 at Esperance Rtg 70+ on January 17 over 1400m, 4 len behind Dothraki with 59kg at $41. Can improve on his recent efforts.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Tightened between runners after the start.
Taken inwards to gain clear running near the 200m.

form.formComment: Gelding returning from a spell and has won previously when first up. Finished off last campaign fifth of 8 at Ascot Rtg 66+ October 25 over 1600m, soft track; 4 len behind Be Bardot with 56kg at $5. Previously first up; fifth of 12 at Pinjarra Cl3 C&G July 9 over 1200m, soft track; 4.5 len behind Repeater carrying 59kg at $4.40. Needs some luck from the draw but he's up to this if fit enough.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-9.5). Gelding returning from a spell and has won previously when first up. previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced keenly through the early stages.
Raced keenly through the early stages. Lay inwards in the straight.
Raced keenly through the early stages. Raced wide throughout.

form.formComment: Second-up. Comes off a 42-day let-up. First-up after seven months led to the turn then faded second last of 12 at Esperance Esperance Spr on March 1 over 1200m, 2.75 len behind First Law carrying 52.5kg at $41. Previously second-up 3rd in a small field at Roebourne Rtg 68+ on May 25 over 1406m, 1.5 len behind Stay Wealthy with 55kg at $2.35. Has won second up before but still hard to get enthused.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-3.5). Second-up. Comes off a 42-day let-up. previousStarts.stewardsComment: Slow to begin, losing 1L. Lay inwards near the 100m having to be corrected.

form.formComment: Has won previously first-up and resumes here after a break of six months. Finished off last preparation won by 2.25 len this track Rtg 58+ October 19 over 1400m defeating Dublin Red with 59.5kg at $1.30. When resuming last campaign third of 13 at Bunbury Cl1 June 5 over 1200m, soft track; 0.7 len behind Run Pattie Run with 56kg at $5. No trial coming in but he can play a leading role if he can return in similar form to how he finished last campaign.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Commenced to race keenly through the middle stages getting its head in the air.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after five months rolled along in front then was edged out late 2nd of 7 at this track Rtg 70+ on April 3 over 1100m, 0.9 len behind Prawns Eleven with 54.5kg at $7.50. Previously second-up 5th of 7 at this track Prov Champ Heat on May 3 over 1200m, 6 len behind Treble Maker carrying 57.5kg at $4.40. Good fresh effort and he'll be hard to reel in with that run under his belt.

form.formComment: Returns from a 32-day let-up. Most recently 9th of 11 at Ascot 0Mwly on March 11 over 1600m, 4.5 len behind Defending carrying 57kg at $17. Before that raced behind the speed prior to fading 8th of 15 at Ascot Westspeed Plat on February 28 over 1400m, 3.5 len behind Magical Sequence with 58.5kg at $26. Not out of the equation.

The run before that eased back early on 9th of 12 at Albany Rtg 58+ on March 26 over 1100m, slow going 7 len behind God Has Drifted carrying 58kg at $51. Better run last time and he can play a leading role.

form.formComment: Resuming after four months in the paddock. Finished off last preparation second of 8 at Narrogin Rtg 46+ December 20 over 1900m, a head behind Tak Goes Boom with 59kg at $3.90. Previously first up; fifth of 10 at Toodyay Rtg 46+ September 28 over 1350m, 2 len behind Lady Negroni with 60.5kg at $9. Doesn't look up to matching the top few here.

form.formComment: Third-up today and placed third-up previously. Resuming 10th of 13 at Pinjarra Scarpside Cl3 C&G on February 22 over 1400m, 6 len behind Desert Waves carrying 54kg at $51. Last start failed to make an impression; second last of 10 at Pinjarra Scarpside Cl3 on March 12 over 1500m, 8 len behind Precious God with 54kg at $71. Has an ordinary barrier to overcome so looking to others.
